title: Jamaican Grilled Chicken Skewers
description: A deliciously flavorful dish featuring marinated chicken, char-grilled to perfection on skewers.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together jerk seasoning, lime juice, olive oil, garlic, and onion.
Add the chicken to the marinade and mix well. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
Thread the marinated chicken, bell peppers, zucchini, and pineapple (if using) onto the skewers.
Brush the grill with olive oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the chicken is cooked through and the vegetables are tender.
Let the skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve hot with your favorite sides, such as rice, beans, or salad.
